strategy: Hit Myth, Life, or Death - all three take boosted damage. She resists 80% Balance, so never attack into Balance.
Never let a helpful charm or aura sit on your team at the end of a round. If one is present, she casts Ra on all wizards.
Blade and hit on the same turn so no charm ever lingers into the end-of-round check.
Set up with traps and Feints instead of leaving blades hanging, since traps are not part of the punish here.
With only 4,325 health, one clean same-turn blade-and-hit takes her and the two minions down before Ra becomes a problem.
cheatNotes: At the end of each round, if any wizard holds a helpful charm or helpful aura, she hits the whole team with Ra (Tier 2b). Blade and attack on the same turn so nothing lingers.
